info.title: Nuvemshop Ecommerce API
info.description: Nuvemshop/Tiendanube ecommerce API for managing products, orders, customers, categories, and webhooks.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products with optional filters.

post.description: Create a new product in the store.

patch.summary: Bulk update stock and price for variants
patch.description: Update stock and/or price for up to 50 variants at once.

422.description: Validation error - exceeding 50 variant limit or invalid values

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Channel filter: form, store, api, meli, pos

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by order number, name, or email

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or identification

422.description: Customer has associated orders and cannot be deleted

BearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token. Pass as Authentication: bearer ACCESS_TOKEN header.
